name: Austrian Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Eggs (5 Large): separated into yolks and whites
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees F.
2. Press the cheese through a sieve.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the cheese and sugar until light.
4. Add the egg yolks, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Then add the milk, lemon rind, and vanilla.
6. Stir in the flour and blend until smooth.
7. In another large mixing bowl, beat the egg whites until they form soft peaks.
8. Gradually add the confectioners' sugar, beating until they form stiff peaks.
9. Fold the whites into the cheese mixture.
10. Gently stir in the raisin bits.
11. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
12. Bake for 55 minutes or until the center appears firm.
13. Let the cake cool in the oven for 15 minutes, then allow to cool to room temperature.
